page.title: Gerald Yang — Builder
page.description: AI Solutions Builder. Full-stack developer shipping multi-agent AI systems, trading dashboards, and production infrastructure.

entries.text: Small computer shop. Fixed machines, sold tech, learned people.
Store Manager. Revenue up 100%+. Ran P&L, coached teams, managed vendors.
Geek Squad field tech by day. 3D printing maker by night. 800+ downloads on MakerWorld.
Self-taught code. 6 months from first line of code to 10 production services.
10 production services shipped. A book published. Building an AI content operations platform. Looking for a team that values builders who communicate.

items.title: Multi-Agent AI Platform
items.description: 5 specialized AI agents with persistent memory, autonomous scheduling, and Telegram interfaces. 24/7 production system.

items.title: Polymarket Trading Dashboard
items.description: Real-time prediction market analytics with multi-account tracking, automated trade execution, and smart-money signal detection.

items.title: Toolbox Web Portal
items.description: Unified gateway consolidating 7+ services with health monitoring, dynamic routing, and integrated document preview.

items.title: E-ink Smart Display
items.description: IoT dashboard rendering RSS feeds, weather, stocks, and AI-generated backgrounds to e-ink displays.

items.title: FieldOps — Smart Dispatch
items.description: AI-powered field service dispatch with route optimization, skill matching, and weather-aware scheduling. Live demo available.

items.title: StoreOps — Retail Dashboard
items.description: Multi-store retail dashboard: P&L tracking, inventory alerts, workforce scheduling across 4 stores. Live demo available.

items.title: Thought Evolution
items.description: AI-powered content processing platform. Paste once, publish everywhere — multi-model rewriting with user-tiered access.

items.title: ServiceQuote
items.description: Service quote generator with product SKU lookup and AI-powered pricing recommendations for field technicians.

items.title: Portfolio Template
items.description: Open-source, single-file developer portfolio template with dark/light theme, 4-language i18n, scroll animations. Zero dependencies.

items.title: 3D Printing & CAD Design
items.description: Original functional designs with 800+ downloads and 296 likes. From Festool tool accessories to desk organizers.

items.title: Tokenomic: REPRICED by AI
items.description: Published book (Amazon, Feb 2026). How AI is repricing intelligence, labor, and you. 74 pages.

items.title: How I Built a 5-Agent AI Platform from Scratch
items.description: 5 agents, 24/7 uptime, 6 months of accumulated memory. Architecture decisions and what I learned.

items.title: From Retail Manager to Production Code in 6 Months
items.description: 0 to 10 production services in 6 months. No bootcamp, no CS degree. The honest timeline.

items.title: Tech Communicator
items.description: 9+ years explaining complex technology to non-technical customers, coaching teams, and running workshops.

items.title: Client-Facing Experience
items.description: Thousands of in-home and on-site consultations. I understand what users actually need.

items.title: Business Operations
items.description: Grew store revenue 100%+ as sole contributor. P&L management, vendor negotiations, team development.

items.title: Bilingual
items.description: Fluent in English and Mandarin Chinese. Comfortable serving diverse communities.

items.title: Geek Squad Field Agent
items.description: Self-directed field technician. Multi-platform diagnostics, MDM deployment, PowerShell automation. Train and mentor junior technicians.

items.title: Store Manager
items.description: Grew revenue 100%+ in 12 months. Full P&L management, team coaching, Apple ATLAS certified.

items.title: Sales Associate / Technician
items.description: Front-line sales and technical support. 45% close rate, repeat client base generating 60% of revenue.

sections.heading: Let's Connect
sections.text: I ship products, explain technology, and solve real problems. If that's what your team needs, let's talk.
